matches.line_text: - Catalogue is in proc/catalog, stores are in proc/stores

- Tools are in `/bin`. especially see sql tool that takes SQLite query as stdin. It operates with the state of the entire catalogue at the start of the session. Run `/bin/sql .schema` to see the schema.
`/bin/sql` runs read-only SQLite queries over the ecommerce catalogue.
Also grab featured storefront SKUs from `/proc/catalog/products.jsonl`.
